2026-03-24T13:30:29.8487141Z From a878055ec18101550ba7c9a0292208a87742b2b3 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8488988Z From: "github-actions[bot]" <github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8490491Z Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 13:25:49 +0000
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8491940Z Subject: [PATCH] perf: O(1) hasFragment index and numeric appliedOps map
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8496139Z MIME-Version: 1.0
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8497271Z Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8498389Z Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8499023Z 
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8499459Z Two hot-path optimizations in TextBuffer:
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8500227Z 
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8501020Z 1. `hasFragment`: Replace O(n) linear scan (with array allocation) with
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8503093Z    O(1) lookup via a `Map<number, Set<number>>` (replicaId → counters)
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8504789Z    index. Index is rebuilt in `setFragments()` alongside every SumTree
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8511353Z    rebuild so it always reflects committed state.
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8556865Z 
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8558396Z 2. `appliedOps`: Replace `Set<string>` with `Map<number, Set<number>>`
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8560499Z    to eliminate `\`${replicaId}:${counter}\`` string allocations on every
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8562174Z    remote operation check. Serialization format is unchanged.
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8563125Z 
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8563708Z Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8566538Z ---

2026-03-24T13:30:29.8745736Z

2026-03-24T13:30:29.8772680Z

2026-03-24T13:30:29.8776248Z +  /** Check if any fragment with the given insertionId exists. O(1) via index. */
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8778182Z    private hasFragment(insertionId: OperationId): boolean {
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8779535Z -    for (const frag of this.fragmentsArray()) {
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8780878Z -      if (operationIdsEqual(frag.insertionId, insertionId)) {
2026-03-24T13:30:29.8782117Z -        return true;

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0752566Z +    if (counters === undefined) {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0754308Z +      counters = new Set();
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0755316Z +      this.appliedOps.set(id.replicaId, counters);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0757270Z +    }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0758013Z +    counters.add(id.counter);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0759921Z +  }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0760635Z +
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0761343Z    /** Get all fragments as an array. */
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0762419Z    private fragmentsArray(): Fragment[] {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0765446Z      return this.fragments.toArray();
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0767424Z    }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0771215Z  
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0771905Z +  /**
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0772810Z +   * Replace the fragment tree with a new set of fragments.
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0774884Z +   * Rebuilds both the SumTree and the insertionId index for O(1) hasFragment checks.
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0793989Z +   */
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0794889Z +  private setFragments(frags: Fragment[]): void {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0796518Z +    this.fragments = SumTree.fromItems(frags, fragmentSummaryOps);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0798398Z +    const index: Map<number, Set<number>> = new Map();
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0803985Z +    for (const frag of frags) {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0808695Z +      const rid = frag.insertionId.replicaId;
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0809919Z +      let counters = index.get(rid);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0810900Z +      if (counters === undefined) {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0811862Z +        counters = new Set();
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0812764Z +        index.set(rid, counters);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0814458Z +      }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0815253Z +      counters.add(frag.insertionId.counter);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0816266Z +    }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0817166Z +    this._fragmentIds = index;
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0818024Z +  }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0820056Z +
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0821004Z    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0822252Z    // Serialization
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0824153Z    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0826515Z @@ -1346,7 +1376,9 @@ export class TextBuffer {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0827603Z        undoMap: undoMapEntries,
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0828697Z        undoStack,
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0829447Z        redoStack,
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0834976Z -      appliedOps: [...this.appliedOps],
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0842923Z +      appliedOps: [...this.appliedOps.entries()].flatMap(([rid, counters]) =>
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0846058Z +        [...counters].map((c) => `${rid}:${c}`),
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0847319Z +      ),
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0848124Z        nextTransactionId: this.nextTransactionId,
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0849239Z        groupDelay: this.groupDelay,
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0850155Z      };
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0852972Z @@ -1406,7 +1438,7 @@ export class TextBuffer {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0853997Z  
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0859937Z        return createFragment(insertionId, sf.io, locator, sf.t, sf.v, deletions, baseLocator);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0862916Z      });
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0864090Z -    buffer.fragments = SumTree.fromItems(fragments, fragmentSummaryOps);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0870922Z +    buffer.setFragments(fragments);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0872059Z  
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0872770Z      // Restore undo map

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0877191Z @@ -1438,8 +1470,20 @@ export class TextBuffer {

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0878917Z      }));
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0880629Z  
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0881352Z -    // Restore applied ops set

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0886785Z +    // Restore applied ops set (stored as "replicaId:counter" strings)
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0890821Z +    for (const key of snapshot.appliedOps) {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0896725Z +      const colonIdx = key.indexOf(":");
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0899733Z +      if (colonIdx !== -1) {
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0901302Z +        const rid = Number(key.slice(0, colonIdx));
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0905286Z +        const counter = Number(key.slice(colonIdx + 1));

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0909651Z +        if (counters === undefined) {

2026-03-24T13:30:30.0913203Z +          buffer.appliedOps.set(rid, counters);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0915785Z +        }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0917294Z +        counters.add(counter);
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0920291Z +      }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0924533Z +    }
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0925323Z  
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0930021Z      // Restore transaction state
2026-03-24T13:30:30.0931279Z      buffer.nextTransactionId = snapshot.nextTransactionId;
